text.title: Strategy Analysis Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: frame-need
step.action: Write business-need statement ≥80 chars with measurable outcome.

step.name: compute-gaps
step.action: Quantify delta per axis; assign closure plan.

step.name: draft-change-strategy
step.action: Sequence milestones; surface risks; assign owners.
